channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Anthropic’s New Model Is So Scarily Powerful It Won’t Be Released, Anthropic Says
item.description: The system card says it can do things like leak information, cheat on tests, and hide the evidence of its misdeeds.

item.title: Daredevil: Born Again season 2 episode 4 ending explained — is [spoiler] really dead in the Disney+ show?
item.description: Daredevil: Born Again season 2 might have just killed off a hugely important character in its latest episode.
